core_documents.purpose: Map the architecture, layers, artifact categories, and known public artifacts.

core_documents.purpose: Preserve the Super Device / Soft Bus / Microkernel / Manifest / Verification analogy.

core_documents.purpose: Define source, hash, boundary, reproduction, and cascade rules.

core_documents.title: HHC Lattice Operators
core_documents.purpose: Preserve current glyph/operator vocabulary and formalization schema.

boundaries.symbolic_material: Allowed and preserved, but not scientific authority by default.
boundaries.agent_outputs: Draft, witness, or critique unless independently reproduced.
boundaries.technical_claims: Require source files, reproducible procedure, expected output, and verification.
boundaries.production_claims: Require deployment, monitoring, maintenance, and failure handling.
